payload.query: Why are democratic countries characterized by particular types of political institutions, that is, such things as electoral systems, the level of power given to upper versus lower of national legislatures, power distributions between national and subnational levels of government, etc. To answer this question, review the literature on Democratic Political Systems and provide an essay that assesses how well comparative politics scholarship answers this question. Be certain to discuss the most important factors that explain why different democratic countries have different institutional arrangements.

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court Decision
articles.abstract: The Supreme Court ruled that the race-conscious admissions programs at Harvard and the University of North Carolina were unlawful, curtailing affirmative action at colleges and universities around the nation.
